_doc: Manual DM ↔ DLD aliases — override the auto fuzzy-matcher in build_curated_polygons.py. Two use cases: (1) force a DLD area_name_en match when fuzzy score is too low (Palm Jumeirah, Palm Deira); (2) override the polygon's display name where DM's admin spelling differs from the user-facing marketing name (Burj Khalifa → 'Downtown Dubai'). Aliases here always win over the fuzzy match.

aliases._comment: 44k tx hidden by fuzzy score 0.71 — biggest single fix in this file
Marketing alias: DLD admin area = Burj Khalifa, user-facing = Downtown Dubai
International City phase 1 — DLD's admin = Al Warsan First. dld_area_name_en required because the build_*_map.py CASE keys off the DLD spelling, not DM.
Admin name Al Hebiah First — all 24k tx are master_project='Motor City'. Display the marketing name; geometry stays DM admin (Motor City covers ~all of Al Hebiah First).
Al Yelayiss 2 admin → all 25k tx are TOWN SQUARE (no remainder worth surfacing). DM spells it 'AL YALAYIS 2' (no 'e' in middle).
Madinat Hind 4 admin → all 16k tx are DAMAC HILLS 2 (no remainder worth surfacing).
Al Barsha South Fourth admin → 99.99% are JVC (90,891 sales). Single biggest admin-shell community in the file.
Nadd Hessa admin → 99.99% are Silicon Oasis (27,427 sales).
Al Kheeran First (DM) = Al Khairan First (DLD). 99.95% Dubai Creek Harbour (25,757 sales). DM uses 'KHEERAN' spelling; DLD uses 'KHAIRAN'.
Al Barsha South Third (DM, single 'a') = Al Barshaa South Third (DLD, double 'a'). 99% Arjan (24,040 sales).
Al Barsha South Fifth admin → 99.98% Jumeirah Village Triangle (19,301 sales).
Al Barsha South Second (DM, single 'a') = Al Barshaa South Second (DLD, double 'a'). 99% Dubai Science Park (11,181 sales).
Wadi Al Safa 6 → 99.96% Arabian Ranches 1 (10,423 sales). DLD's master_project spelling is 'Arabian Ranches - 1' with hyphen; we drop the hyphen for the display name.
Al Yufrah 1 → 99% The Valley (9,607 sales).
Al Thanyah First → 99.95% Barsha Heights (6,464 sales). DM uses 'AL THANYAH FIRST'.
Saih Shuaib 1 → 92% Jebel Ali Hills (4,194 sales). DLD's master_project is uppercase 'JABEL ALI HILLS'.
Al Kifaf → 99% Wasl 1 (3,406 sales).
Al Hebiah Second → 97% Dubai Studio City (5,102 sales). Remainder ~148 Arabian Ranches Polo Homes — leakage acceptable.
Al Hebiah Sixth → 100% Mudon (4,211 sales). Mudon also has a slice in Al Hebiah Third (1,858) — see _needs_split.
Hessyan First → 91% Badra (440 sales). Small remainder Dubai Water Front + Veneto leak — acceptable.
Al Yufrah 2 → 100% DAMAC HILLS 2 (5,448 sales). DAMAC Hills 2 spans 3 admin shells: Madinat Hind 4 + Al Yufrah 2 + Al Yufrah 3 (also aliased separately).
Saih Shuaib 3 → 100% Dubai Industrial City (166 sales). Industrial City spans Saih Shuaib 3 + 4.
Saih Shuaib 4 → 100% Dubai Industrial City (534 sales).

Nadd Al Shiba First → 51% Meydan Racecourse Community (6.4k tx), rest is Nad Al Sheba Gardens + nulls. The OSM 'Meydan Racecourse' polygon is nearly identical to the DM polygon, so a sub-polygon split would create two overlapping polygons. Alias the whole DM area to 'Meydan' instead.

_unsure_skipped: AL THANYAH SECOND — fuzzy says 'Al Nahda Second' but they're likely different
OUD AL MUTEENA → Al Muteena — these may be separate Deira neighbourhoods
AL MURAR — DLD has only 'Al-Murar Qadeem' (59) / 'Al-Murar Jadeed' (29); skipping till verified
AL HATHMAH → AL Athbah — different places
MEREIYEEL, AL O'SHOOSH, AL WOHOOSH, HEFAIR, MARGAB, ENKHALI — peripheral, ≤50 tx if anything
_needs_split_not_alias: AL HEBIAH THIRD — 89% DAMAC Hills (16,418) + 10% Mudon (1,858). Split into DAMAC Hills + Mudon sub-polygons.
ME'AISEM FIRST — 81% IMPZ (21,241) + 19% Jumeirah Golf Estates (4,910). Split.
MADINAT DUBAI AL MELAHEYAH — 69% Dubai Maritime City (9,800) + 31% Mina Rashid (4,419). Split. Maritime City has no OSM polygon (would use split-dm-fallback).
WADI AL SAFA 2 — 70% Liwan (8,836) + 21% Falcon City (2,697) + 8% master-NULL (1,028). Split into Liwan + Falcon City + remainder.
